name: Tag Group
description: Groups multiple tags with consistent spacing and optional drag-to-reorder.

props.name: reorderable
props.description: Enable drag-and-drop reordering of child `kb-tag[kb-draggable]` elements.

events.name: kb-reorder
events.description: Fired after drag reorder completes. `detail.order` is an array of tag `value` strings.

events.name: kb-drag-start
events.description: Fired when a tag drag begins. `detail.value` is the dragged tag value.

events.name: kb-drag-end
events.description: Fired when a tag drag ends. `detail.value` is the dragged tag value.
